chunks.title: Job's Desire to Find God
chunks.reason: Job expresses his longing to present his case before God and argues that God would listen rather than contend with him by power.

chunks.title: God's Presence and Job's Faithfulness
chunks.reason: Job describes searching for God in all directions while affirming his own adherence to God's path and commandments.

chunks.title: God's Sovereignty and Job's Dread
chunks.reason: Job reflects on God's unique will and decrees, acknowledging his own fear and dismay despite not being silenced by darkness.
